testcase.name: runScenario

failure.message: ❌ Name not updated expected [ABC] but found []

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: ❌ Name not updated expected [ABC] but found [] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at org.testng.Assert.assertEqualsImpl(Assert.java:150) at org.testng.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:132) at org.testng.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:656) at com.redbus.testing.stepdefinition.Accounts.verify_profile_details(Accounts.java:81) at ✽.profile should reflect updated details "ABC" "abc@gmail.com" "female"(file:///C:/Redbus_Selenium_UI_Framework/./src/test/java/com/redbus/testing/featurefiles/Accounts.feature:13)
